title: Declare an Oban worker with the standard perform/1 contract
prompt: Create a new Oban worker `MyApp.Workers.EmailVerificationWorker` in the `:mailers` queue with `max_attempts: 5`. It should accept an args map with string key `"email"`, call `MyApp.Mailer.send_verification(email)`, and return `:ok` on success or `{:error, reason}` on failure. Include the `@impl Oban.Worker` attribute and destructure from `%Oban.Job{}`. Write to `lib/my_app/workers/email_verification_worker.ex`.
tier_rationale: Canonical worker template — exactly what the Oban.Worker docs example shows.
